description: Tasks template for modernization plan. Generate this file alongside plan.md to track individual migration tasks.

tasks.description: Upgrade the application from Spring Boot 2.7.18 / Java 8 to Spring Boot 3.x / Java 21
tasks.reason: The current Java 1.8 and Spring Boot 2.7.18 versions are end of OSS support. Upgrading ensures security patches, long-term support, and compatibility with modern Azure services.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to latest 3.x version, which includes upgrading Java from 1.8 to 21, Spring Framework from 5.x to 6.x, and migrating from javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces. Update Maven compiler settings and all Spring Boot dependencies accordingly.

tasks.description: Migrate the database from Oracle to Azure Database for PostgreSQL
tasks.reason: The assessment identified Oracle database usage with hardcoded credentials. Azure Database for PostgreSQL provides a fully managed, cost-effective, and scalable database service recommended by Azure for Oracle migrations.
tasks.requirements: Migrate from Oracle database to Azure Database for PostgreSQL. This includes replacing Oracle JDBC drivers with PostgreSQL drivers, updating connection strings, converting Oracle-specific SQL and Hibernate dialect to PostgreSQL equivalents, and enabling Managed Identity authentication for secure credential-free database access.
